top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND d.A2 = 'South Bohemia';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND d.A2 = 'South Bohemia';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id)
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND d.A2 = 'South Bohemia';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.account_id)
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND d.A2 = 'South Bohemia';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND d.A2 = 'South Bohemia';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM client c
INNER JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND d.A2 = 'South Bohemia';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id)
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND d.A2 = 'South Bohemia';

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND d.A2 = 'South Bohemia';
